title: Publicity & Backlinks Using HARO
summary: How to use Help a Reporter Out (HARO) to earn media coverage and quality backlinks at the same time. The mechanics, the pitch framework, and what to do with coverage once you get it.
full_content_text: How to use Help a Reporter Out (HARO) to earn media coverage and quality backlinks at the same time. The mechanics, the pitch framework, and what to do with coverage once you get it.
